Home.heroTitle: Clinical Finnish for nurses working in Finland
Home.heroDesc: Language training built around real nursing situations, taught by a registered nurse working in Finland.
Home.who1Body: Registered nurses already working or planning to work in the Finnish healthcare system.
Home.who2Body: You already know Finnish and want to sharpen your clinical nursing communication.
Home.who3Body: Nurses trained abroad adapting to working in Finnish wards and departments.
Home.why1Body: Lessons are based on real situations from daily work in Accident & Emergency.
Home.why2Body: Rachael learned Finnish through courses and real work experience, so she understands your challenges.
Home.why3Body: Experience across emergency, cardiac, medical, and geriatric care.
Home.quote: I know what it feels like to struggle with Finnish in a clinical setting. That's why I teach it.
Home.how2Body: Send a message and get confirmation within 3 days.
Home.how3Body: Join online sessions with real clinical content.
Home.how4Body: Use Finnish at work with patients and colleagues.

About.heroDesc: I am a registered nurse working in Accident & Emergency in Finland. I teach healthcare Finnish based on real experience.
About.bgP1: I graduated in 2005 from JAMK University of Applied Sciences in Jyväskylä.
About.bgP2: I have worked in elderly care, geriatric wards, medical wards, cardiac units, and emergency departments.
About.bgP3: My main experience is in Accident & Emergency.
About.bgP4: I learned Finnish through courses and real work experience and hold certificates from JAMK and the University of Helsinki.
About.bgP5: I teach clinical Finnish to nurses who already have B2 level or higher.
About.clinical5Body: Nursing, personal assistance, and support services delivered in the home for elderly clients — combining kotisairaanhoito and kotipalvelu.
About.philQuote: Healthcare Finnish is not about being perfect. It's about being understood — by your patient, your colleague, and yourself in a high-pressure moment.
About.philBody: Every session is built around realistic situations. Not grammar drills. Not abstract vocabulary lists. Real language, in real contexts, that you'll use on your next shift.

Courses.heroDesc: Clinical Finnish for nurses with B2 level or higher.
Courses.groupDesc: Small online groups with real clinical practice.
Courses.individualDesc: Personalized lessons based on your needs.
Courses.faq1Q: What level of Finnish do I need?
Courses.faq1A: These courses are designed for professionals who already have B2-level Finnish or above. If you're unsure whether you qualify, book a free call with Rachael and she'll advise you.
Courses.faq2A: All sessions are online via video call (Zoom or Teams). You just need a stable internet connection and a quiet space.
Courses.faq3Q: Can I do both group and 1-on-1?
Courses.faq3A: Absolutely. Many students do group sessions for general clinical vocabulary and add 1-on-1 sessions to focus on their specific department or gaps.
Courses.faq4A: I'll get in touch within 3 working days to arrange a short intro call, confirm your background, and agree on a schedule.

Contact.heroDesc: Send a message and I will reply within 3 working days.
Contact.next1: I'll read your message and get back to you within 3 working days.
Contact.next2: We'll have a quick chat to make sure the course is the right fit for your level and goals.
Contact.next3: I'll send you a schedule and payment details.
Contact.next4: You're in — your first session is booked.
